title: Alloplectus cristatus

Alloplectus cristatus is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is part of the genus Alloplectus, which contains a limited number of species. The classification of Alloplectus cristatus reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Gesneriaceae family.
